meaning: n.[国名]加蓬(位于非洲中西部,首都利伯维尔)
examples: Cameroon, Mozambique and Gabon tie at third from bottom.
The trip to Gabon reinforced his belief in himself and his mission.
Mr Bongo made no distinction between Gabon and his private property.
Burkina Faso, Gabon and Benin are the other countries expected to feature in the competition.
